title: BURN THE WITCH
sourceNotes: 3-episode ONA (streamed format of the Oct. 2020 theatrical film) retelling Tite Kubo's Burn the Witch. Manga complete at 5 chapters (the redrawn 'Chapter 0.8' one-shot plus Chapters 1-4, collected in Volume 1); a second manga season has been announced but is not yet reflected in AniList's chapter count. Ep 1 adapts Chapter 0.8; Ep 2 adapts Chapters 1-2; Ep 3 adapts Chapters 3-4.

mappings.arc: Chapter 0.8: Don't Judge a Book by Its Cover
Witches Blow a New Pipe / Ghillie Suit
She Makes Me Special / If a Lion Could Speak
